Bug / Task Description: The sorted-list intersection used by the index is incorrect: when both input lists share an element, only one of the two cursors advances past the matched value. This leaves the other cursor stuck on the already-consumed element, producing wrong intersection results (missing or spurious ids) for posting-list queries. Fix the merge so that after recording a common element, both cursors advance past it.
Commit Subject: fix(index): advance both cursors after a matched intersection element
